columns.column_name: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1
columns.extraction_plan: The class of agent for Darolutamide is an androgen receptor pathway inhibitor, found in Chunk 8 (Introduction). The type of therapeutic agent for ADT is androgen-deprivation therapy, found in Chunk 8 (Abstract, Introduction, Methods). The class of agent for docetaxel is not explicitly reported in the provided chunks.
